case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ASHLEY PIA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,056.90 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PIA, ASHLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE SERVED OCT-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PIA, ASHLEY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANK TAYLOR--CCSF. NO COST CHARGES BY SERVER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIA, ASHLEY $2,056.90 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,056.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PIA, ASHLEY
